title: Van Tonder Inc thanks George for their support
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Van Tonder Inc is a...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Van Tonder Inc is a George-based niche firm that specialises in the conveyancing of immovable property.

We strive towards consistently rendering an excellent and pro-active professional service to all our clients, while keeping them updated and duly informed throughout the property transfer process.


> We are passionate about people and about rendering great service to our clients.


It is truly an honour and a privilege to have been nominated for the Best of George Readers’ Choice Award and we sincerely hope to make our valued clients proud to be associated with our firm.

Please vote for us at https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/ by 17 July and help us bring home the title!

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
